## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` clean
- [ ] `pnpm lint` clean
- [ ] For new logic: test added in its own commit before the implementation (TDD)
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` values committed
